narrative:
Middleburg Heights-03-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,038 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
